given: A SKU has stock records with batch_number and serial_number populated
when: The SKU detail view is rendered
then: Each location row displays batch number and serial number as separate fields, replacing the combined tracking code field
architectural_notes: E2E: The batch_number and serial_number persisted on each stock record are surfaced through the SKU-detail route -> service -> repository read and rendered per location row as separate fields. Owner modules: stock SKU-detail API route (app/routes/) projects batch_number and serial_number; SkuDetail component (client/src/components/SkuDetail.tsx) displays them as separate label/value pairs. S4 replaces the pre-split inventory_code field display with post-split batch+serial fields.

independence.rationale: AC1-AC2 test the home table view; AC3 tests the detail view, which is a different component/page and could fail independently from the table rendering.
